title: All deductions, credits and expenses - Personal income tax - Canada.ca
content:
## All deductions, credits and expenses - Personal income tax
Find out which deductions, credits and expenses you can claim to reduce the amount of tax you need to pay.
- use the tick boxes to filter by topic
- enter a keyword at "Filter items"
- sort by line number, topic or category
